description_long: This is a cylindrical urban trash bin with a domed top and a matte black finish. The front features a prominent white recycling symbol and a small red squiggle, suggesting it is intended for recyclable waste. The sides and back display large vertical yellow reflective panels for visibility, and one side has a pink cat graphic with Japanese text. The opening is a horizontal slot beneath the recycling symbol, designed for easy deposit of waste. The bin appears to be made primarily of metal, with no visible handles or wheels, and the lid is integrated into the main body. The overall design is robust and vandal-resistant, suitable for public spaces such as sidewalks or parks.
description: A black cylindrical trash bin with a domed top, recycling symbol, and yellow reflective panels. It features a horizontal slot opening and urban-themed graphics.
description_view_0: Front view shows the recycling symbol, red squiggle, and the main slot opening.
description_view_1: Side view highlights a large yellow reflective panel, with no visible opening or graphics.
description_view_2: Rear view displays another yellow reflective panel and a pink cat graphic with Japanese text.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the yellow reflective panel and part of the pink cat graphic.
attribute_labeling_or_signage: recycling symbol, red squiggle, pink cat graphic with Japanese text
